name: Peanut Butter Honey Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the shortening and peanut butter until smooth.
2. Add the honey and mix thoroughly.
3. Gradually blend in the brown sugar.
4. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
5. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. Stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
7. If using, stir in the raisins.
8. Shape the dough into a roll and wrap it in wax paper.
9. Chill the dough thoroughly in the refrigerator.
10. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
11. Cut the chilled dough into thin slices and bake on greased cookie sheets for 10 to 12 minutes.
12. Yield: 4 to 5 dozen cookies.
